tweet.text:
here are 50 powerful claude prompts that automate hours of manual work.

these prompts help you design, build, and optimize ai-powered systems, workflows, and agents.

save this. you’ll use it more than you think.

— design an ai agent
design an ai agent that can [goal]. define the tools it needs, what it decides on its own, what needs human approval, and how it handles failure.

 —build a prompt chain
create a multi-step prompt chain that turns [input] → [output]. break it into steps and show how each output feeds the next.

— create a system prompt
write a system prompt for an ai acting as [role] for [use case]. define tone, capabilities, limits, and how it handles edge cases.

— improve a prompt
analyze this prompt, identify flaws, and rewrite it to produce better outputs: [paste prompt]

— design a rag system
design a rag system for [use case]. include data sources, chunking, embeddings, and retrieval strategy.

— build a classification pipeline
design a pipeline that classifies [inputs] into [categories]. include preprocessing, thresholds, and edge case handling.

— create an extraction prompt
write a prompt that extracts [data] from [document type] into structured json. handle missing or uncertain fields.

— design a multi-agent system
design a system where multiple agents collaborate to achieve [goal]. define roles, communication, and conflict resolution.

— build an evaluation framework
design a framework to evaluate ai outputs for [use case]. define metrics and what “good” looks like.

— create a summarization pipeline
design a system that processes [content] into [summary format]. handle long inputs and flag uncertain outputs.

— design a content moderation system
create a moderation pipeline for [platform]. define categories, thresholds, and human review flow.

— build a qa system
design a question-answering system over [knowledge base]. include preprocessing and retrieval strategy.

— create a data enrichment workflow
design a workflow that takes [input data] and enriches it with [additional data] using ai. define steps and failure handling.

— design an ai writing assistant
design an ai writing assistant for [use case]. define capabilities, constraints, and how it handles off-scope requests.

— build a feedback loop system
design a system where outputs are evaluated, feedback is collected, and performance improves over time.

— create a document processing pipeline
design a pipeline that ingests [documents], extracts structured data, validates it, and stores it.

— design a personalization engine
design an ai system that personalizes [experience]. define signals, recommendation logic, and cold-start handling.

— build a monitoring system
design a system that tracks output quality, latency, cost, and failures. define alerts and dashboards.

— create a prompt library
create 10 reusable prompt templates for [use case] with placeholders and examples.

— design a human-in-the-loop system
design a system where ai handles most tasks but routes edge cases to humans.

— build a knowledge graph pipeline
design a pipeline that extracts entities and relationships into a knowledge graph.

— create a customer support agent
design an ai agent that handles support queries and escalates complex issues.

— design a code review ai
design an ai that reviews code for [standards] and provides structured feedback.

— build a research assistant
design an ai that researches [topic], summarizes insights, and flags low-confidence info.

— create a competitive intelligence system
design a system that tracks competitors and generates weekly insights.

— design a meeting intelligence system
design a system that turns meeting transcripts into summaries, actions, and decisions.

— build a contract analysis pipeline
design a system that reviews contracts and flags risks.

— create a sentiment analysis system
design a system that analyzes sentiment from [data source] and reports insights.

— design a lead scoring system
design a system that scores leads based on conversion likelihood.

— build a recommendation engine
design a system that recommends content/products based on user behavior.

— create an anomaly detection system
design a system that detects unusual patterns in [data].

— design a translation workflow
design a workflow that translates content while maintaining consistency and quality.

— build a proposal generator
design a system that creates business proposals from structured inputs.

— create a risk assessment system
design a system that evaluates risk in [domain] and outputs actionable insights.

— design a voice ai system
design a voice assistant for [use case] with intent recognition and fallback handling.

— build a trend detection system
design a system that monitors data sources and identifies emerging trends.

— create a compliance system
design a system that checks content/actions against regulations.

— design an onboarding system
design an ai that guides new users/employees and tracks progress.

— build a predictive maintenance system
design a system that predicts failures and triggers actions.

— create an inventory ai
design a system that forecasts demand and manages stock levels.

— design a financial analysis agent
design an agent that analyzes financial data and produces insights.

— build a social monitoring system
design a system that tracks mentions, sentiment, and alerts.

— create a technical support ai
design a system that diagnoses issues and learns from past tickets.

— design a pricing system
design a system that optimizes pricing based on demand and competition.

— build a fraud detection system
design a system that detects fraudulent activity and minimizes false positives.

— create a scheduling system
design a system that handles scheduling, conflicts, and priorities.

— design a quality control ai
design a system that detects defects in products/processes.

— build a news aggregation system
design a system that collects, ranks, and summarizes news.

— create a personalized learning system
design a system that adapts learning based on user progress.

— design a supply chain system
design a system that predicts disruptions and optimizes operations.

save this. this is basically a cheat code for building and selling ai automation systems.

author.name: m0h
author.description: sharing daily contents to help you make the most from AI products...

raw_description.text: sharing daily contents to help you make the most from AI products...

quote.text:
if you’re serious about learning profitable AI skills that can earn you 4/5fig deals (bookmark this).

here are free youtube beginner series for each skill:

→ ai agents for beginners – http://youtube.com/watch?v=OhI005…
learn how to build ai systems that can take actions and automate tasks.

→ context engineering – http://youtube.com/watch?v=4GiqzU…
understand how ai “remembers” and uses information to give better outputs.

→ MCPs (model context protocol) – http://youtube.com/watch?v=VfZlgl…
how ai connects to tools, apps, and data (think usb for ai).

→ claude code – http://youtube.com/watch?v=SUysp3…
use claude to write, debug, and ship code faster.

→ APIS – http://youtube.com/watch?v=WXsD0Z…
learn how to connect apps and let ai interact with real-world data.

→ cursor vibecoding  – http://youtube.com/watch?v=2aldTx…
ai-powered code editor that helps you build projects faster.

→ prompts engineering – http://youtube.com/watch?v=qBlX6F…
how to write better instructions to get high-quality outputs from ai.

→ openclaw automation – http://youtube.com/watch?v=n1sfrc…
run and manage ai agents locally for more control.

bonus: free ai agents resources – http://github.com/avinash201199/
collection of tools and frameworks to get started fast.

follow for more content on ai skills, automation, and workflows.
